{{Navbox | name = Animal as Bridegroom | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | title = "[[:en:Animal as Bridegroom|Animal as Bridegroom]]" | listclass = hlist
| group1 = Literary tales | list1 = * [[:en:Cupid and Psyche|Cupid and Psyche]] * [[Pintosmalto]] * [[Fairer-than-a-Fairy (Mailly)|Fairer-than-a-Fairy]] * [[The Ram (fairy tale)|The Ram]] * [[Graciosa and Percinet]] * [[The Green Serpent]] * [[:en:Beauty and the Beast|Beauty and the Beast]] * [[The Story of Princess Zeineb and King Leopard]] * [[The Blue Bird (fairy tale)|The Blue Bird]]
| group2 = Main tale types | list2 = {{Navbox|subgroup | group1 = ATU 425 | list1 = * [[Pintosmalto]] * [[Mr Simigdáli|Master Semolina/Mr Simigdáli]] * [[Fairer-than-a-Fairy (Mailly)|Fairer-than-a-Fairy]] * [[The Ram (fairy tale)|The Ram]]
| group2 = ATU 425A | list2 = *[[:en:Black Bull of Norroway|Black Bull of Norroway]] *[[The Brown Bear of Norway]] *[[The Daughter of the Skies]] *[[The Tale of the Hoodie]] *[[The Three Daughters of King O'Hara]] *[[The White Hound of the Mountain]] *[[The Sprig of Rosemary]] *[[The Enchanted Snake]] *[[White-Bear-King-Valemon]] *[[East of the Sun and West of the Moon]] *[[Prince Hat Under the Ground]] *[[The Iron Stove]] *[[The Enchanted Pig]] *[[Whitebear Whittington]] *[[The Serpent Prince]] *[[Sigurd, the King's Son]] *[[The White Wolf (fairy tale)|The White Wolf]] *[[Trandafiru]] *[[:en:Again, The Snake Bridegroom|Again, The Snake Bridegroom]] *[[Prince Crawfish (Belarusian folktale)|Prince Crawfish]] *[[King Crin (Italian fairy tale)|King Crin]] *[[The Tale of the Little Dog]] *[[About the astonishing husband Horu (Ukrainian folktale)|About the astonishing husband Horu]] * [[Prince Whitebear (Danish folktale)|Prince Whitebear]] * [[The Snake Prince]]
| group3 = ATU 425B | list3 = * [[:en:Cupid and Psyche|Cupid and Psyche]] *[[Graciosa and Percinet]] *[[The Green Serpent]] *[[The King of Love]] *[[Prince Wolf]] (Ulv Kongesøn) *[[The Golden Root (Italian fairy tale)|The Golden Root]] *[[The Horse-Devil and the Witch]] *[[Tulisa, the Wood-Cutter's Daughter]] * [[Khastakhumar and Bibinagar]] * [[Habrmani]] * [[The Son of the Ogress]] * [[Yasmin and the Serpent Prince]] * [[The Little Crab (Greek folktale)|The Little Crab]] * [[Pájaro Verde (Mexican folktale)|Pájaro Verde]] * [[Los Tres Claveles (Spanish folktale)]] * [[The Story of the Abandoned Princess]] * [[Grünkappe]] * [[The Snake-Prince Sleepy-Head]] * [[The Padisah's Youngest Daughter and Her Donkey-Skull Husband]] * [[The Princess Who Could Not Keep a Secret]] * [[The Tale of Aftab (Azerbaijani folktale)|The Tale of Aftab]] * [[The Tale of the Woodcutter and his Daughters]] * [[Sea-Horse (Syrian folktale)]] | group4 = ATU 425C | list4 = *[[:en:Beauty and the Beast|Beauty and the Beast]] *[[The Singing, Springing Lark]] *[[The Small-tooth Dog]] *[[The Scarlet Flower]]
| group5 = ATU 425D | list5 = * [[The Golden Crab]] * [[The Donkey's Head]] * [[The Donkey's Head (Turkish folktale)]]
| group6 = ATU 425E | list6 = * [[The Padlock (Italian fairy tale)|The Padlock]] * [[Filek-Zelebi]]
}}
| group3 = Other tale types | list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup | group1 = AaTh 425G<sup>p</sup> | list1 = *[[The Sleeping Prince (fairy tale)|The Sleeping Prince]]
| group2 = ATU 425M | list2 = * [[:en:Eglė the Queen of Serpents|Eglė the Queen of Serpents]] * [[The Lake Beetle as Groom]]
| group3 = AaTh 425N<sup>p</sup> | list3 = * [[The Story of Princess Zeineb and King Leopard]] * [[María, manos blancas (Spanish fairy tale)|María, manos blancas]] * [[Feather O' My Wing (Irish fairy tale)|Feather O' My Wing]] * [[The Man Who Came Out Only at Night]]
}}
| group4 = Related tales | list4 = {{Navbox|subgroup | group1 = ATU 426 | list1 = * [[Snow-White and Rose-Red]]
| group2 = AaTh 428<sup>p</sup> | list2 = *[[Prunella (fairy tale)|Prunella]] * [[The Little Girl Sold with the Pears]] * [[La Fada Morgana (Catalan folk tale)|La Fada Morgana]] * [[The Man and the Girl at the Underground Mansion]] * [[The Girl as Soldier (Russian folktale)|The Girl as Soldier]] * [[The Tale About Baba-Yaga]]
| group3 = ATU 430 | list3 = * [[The Donkey (fairy tale)|The Donkey]]
| group4 = ATU 431 | list4 = * [[The Hut in the Forest]]
| group5 = ATU 432 | list5 = * [[The Bird Lover|The Prince as Bird]] * [[The Blue Bird (fairy tale)|The Blue Bird]] * [[The Canary Prince]] * [[The Three Sisters (fairy tale)|The Three Sisters]] * [[:en:The Green Knight (fairy tale)|The Green Knight]] * [[The Feather of Finist the Falcon]] * [[Prince Sobur]] * [[The Fan of Patience (Pakistani fairy tale)|The Fan of Patience]] * [[The Greenish Bird]] * [[The Falcon Pipiristi (Komi folktale)|The Falcon Pipiristi]]
| group6 = ATU 433 | list6 = * [[King Lindworm]] * [[The Dragon-Prince and the Stepmother]] * [[The Girl with Two Husbands]] * [[Dragon-Child and Sun-Child (Armenian folktale)|Dragon-Child and Sun-Child]] * [[:en:Champavati|Champavati]] * [[The Story of the Hamadryad]] * [[The Origin of the Sirenia (Cambodian folktale)|The Origin of the Sirenia]]
| group7 = AaTh 437<sup>p</sup> | list7 = * [[The Dead Prince and the Talking Doll]] * [[Kajalrekha (Bengali folk ballad)|Kajalrekha]]
| group8 = ATU 440 | list8 = * [[The Frog Prince]] * [[The Well of the World's End]] * [[The Tale of the Queen Who Sought a Drink From a Certain Well]]
| group9 = ATU 441 | list9 = * [[Hans My Hedgehog]] * [[The Pig King]] * [[The Hedgehog, the Merchant, the King and the Poor Man]]
| group10 = ATU 442 | list10 = * [[The Old Woman in the Wood]]
| group11 = ATU 444* | list11 = * [[Habogi]] * [[Hermod and Hadvor]] }}
| below = '''Notes:''' "Literary" indicates tale whose origin is traceable to a literary source with a known author; <sup>p</sup> indicates a previous tale type extant until 2004. "AaTh" refers to the [[:en:Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index|Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] pre-2004; "ATU" refers to the system post-2004.
}}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:ATU 400-459]]
